problem: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed?
hypothesis: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Telomerase. Telomerase activation/inhibition in target cells directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: If you want to find the secrets of the universe, think in terms of energy, frequency and vibration. — Tesla
